name: Media Generator
description: Native media generation workspace for image, video, and audio tasks through Gee's global Xenodia channel.

capabilities.title: List media generation models
capabilities.description: List the media generation models exposed through Gee's global Xenodia channel.
examples: What image generation models can I use?

codex.skill_hint: Use when Codex needs to inspect the media generation models available through GeeAgent.

capabilities.title: Create media generation task
capabilities.description: Create a media generation task from a prompt, model, optional parameters, and optional reference image paths or URLs.
examples: Generate an image of a neon rainy study room
Use this reference image and make a cinematic poster

category.description: Only image generation is currently wired through Xenodia.

model.description: Use gpt-image-2 for GPT Image-2. image-2 is accepted as an alias.

n.description: Xenodia image generation currently supports only 1 image per request.

batch_count.description: Gear-level batch fan-out. Gee creates one Xenodia n=1 task per requested image and returns one grouped batch result.

async.description: When true, create an async Xenodia task and poll the task endpoint. Gee defaults this to true.

response_format.description: Only URL responses are currently supported.

aspect_ratio.description: Supported ratios vary by model; 3:4 is supported by GPT Image-2.

reference_urls.description: Remote reference image URLs passed as Xenodia image_input. Gear validation enforces the selected model limit.

reference_paths.description: Optional local JPEG, PNG, or WebP image paths, up to 30MB each. Gear validation enforces the selected model limit.

codex.skill_hint: Use only when the current user message explicitly asks Codex to create a media generation task. Preserve the user's prompt, map image-2 to gpt-image-2, use batch_count 1-4 for multi-image requests, prefer async=true, and report the returned task_id or batch_id/artifact references instead of claiming the image is finished before Gee returns it.

capabilities.title: Get generation task
capabilities.description: Return the latest saved status, prompt, parameters, artifacts, and provider task id for a media generation task.
examples: Check the last image generation task

codex.skill_hint: Use when Codex needs to inspect the saved status or artifacts for a media generation task created in GeeAgent.
